data.body: STATE: CLOSED + green. Change 650 Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1; completion-verifier signed. Delivered src/rebar/attest/trusted_env.py (.rebar/trusted_environments.yaml loader — fail-open absent / located-error malformed; verify_required_environment verifies against the PINNED key, not the cert's self-claimed keyid) + verify.require_environment / verify.opcert_enforce_since config. Held-out TDD incl keyid-spoof defense; mutation-checked. Ready to submit.
